records.ety: [L., fr. Gr. <?/; pro`swpon a face, a person + <?/ to make.]

defs: A figure by which things are represented as persons, or by which things inanimate are spoken of as animated beings; also, a figure by which an absent person is introduced as speaking, or a deceased person is represented as alive and present. It includes personification, but is more extensive in its signification.
